message:
perf: Implement hash join for O(n+m) instead of O(n*m) nested loop

- Add hash table data structure with 262K buckets for fast lookups
- Use MurmurHash3 finalizer for good hash distribution
- Build phase: hash the right table O(n)
- Probe phase: scan left table with O(1) lookups
- Support duplicate keys with chained entries
- Maintain LEFT/FULL OUTER JOIN semantics
- Expected 10-100x speedup for large table joins
